changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('jhi_user', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM jhi_user), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('extended_user', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM extended_user), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('pillar', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM pillar), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('pillar_translation', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM pillar_translation), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('sub_pillar', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM sub_pillar), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('sub_pillar_translation', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM sub_pillar_translation), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('sub_pillar_item', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM sub_pillar_item), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('sub_pillar_item_translation', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM sub_pillar_item_translation), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('life_evaluation', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM life_evaluation), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('evaluation_decision', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM evaluation_decision), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('trip_plan', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM trip_plan), 1), false)
SELECT setval(pg_get_serial_sequence('trip_plan_step', 'id'), GREATEST((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM trip_plan_step), 1), false)
